name: Biscotti (Actually Some Sort of Cream Puff)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend the flour, sugar, butter, baking powder, lemon rind, and salt until well combined.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface and cut into 4-inch circles using a water glass.
4. Line a greased cupcake pan with the 12 larger circles.
5. Fill each circle with pastry cream (see recipe below).
6. Place another 4-inch circle on top of each filling to seal it, creating two layers in each cup.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until set and golden brown.
8. Allow the cupcakes to cool completely in the pan.
Vanilla Cream:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, mix together the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk while stirring continuously until a smooth paste is formed.
3. Microwave the mixture on high for 8-9 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until thickened.
4. Whisk egg yolks (or whole eggs) in another bowl.
5. Stir a portion of the hot cream into the yolk mixture, then return it to the bowl with the remaining cream.
6. Microwave at high for 1-2 minutes or until thick and glossy.
7. Add butter, vanilla extract, and optionally almond extract.
8. Allow the cream to cool before assembling the cupcakes.
9. Serve warm if desired.
